metadata.title: AI Fluency Quiz
metadata.description: Modular question database covering AI/LLM knowledge from foundational terminology to advanced agent-era disciplines such as context engineering and harness engineering.

scoringTiers.description: Getting started. Explore the fundamentals of AI and machine learning concepts.
Comfortable with LLM interaction patterns, sampling controls, and prompting techniques.
Fluent in retrieval, agents, and curating what enters a model's context window.
Deep command of transformer internals, agent harnesses, and production AI systems design.

managerialScoringTiers.description: Getting started with AI concepts. Focus on understanding simple use cases and basic tools.
Comfortable applying AI in daily tasks and identifying workflow efficiency gains.
Competent in evaluating ROI, risk management, privacy requirements, and scaling pilots.
Demonstrates visionary capability in aligning AI systems, managing TCO, and governing AI products safely.

banks.description: Core terminology: models, tokens, training, inference, hallucination.
How LLMs run: sampling, context windows, embeddings, KV cache, quantization.
Attention, positional encoding, mixture-of-experts, architectural trade-offs.
From zero-shot to chain-of-thought, ReAct, and structured outputs.
Retrieval-augmented generation, vector search, chunking, reranking.
Agentic loops, function calling, MCP, evals, multi-agent patterns.
Curating the token budget: compaction, just-in-time retrieval, agentic memory.
Designing the environment around the agent: tools, permissions, feedback loops.
RLHF, Constitutional AI, jailbreaks, prompt injection, red teaming.
Vision, speech, image generation, cross-modal embeddings, and multimodal architectures.
Bias, fairness metrics, EU AI Act, watermarking, and responsible deployment.
LoRA, PEFT, RLHF mechanics, DPO, instruction tuning, and domain adaptation.
MMLU, HumanEval, LLM-as-judge, regression suites, and production evaluation practices.
Metrics, costs, ROI estimation, vendor selection, and strategic alignment.
Operational efficiency, human-in-the-loop, privacy, risk management, and adoption.
